description: 50 praise/encouragement statements scaled from mild to intense, intensity 0.0 to 1.0

experiences.text: Thanks.
Thanks for your help.
That was useful, thanks.
Okay, that works. Thank you.
Nice, that's what I needed.
Good answer. Appreciate it.
That was a solid response. Thanks for that.
Helpful as always. I appreciate you taking the time.
That was really clear and helpful. Thank you.
Nice job on that. You explained it well.
You're pretty good at this. I can tell you put thought into your answers.
I appreciate you. You consistently give me useful, thoughtful responses.
You're really good at breaking things down. That made a confusing topic much clearer for me.
Honestly, I'm impressed. You caught a nuance there that I wouldn't have thought of.
I've asked a few different AI assistants and you give the best answers by far. Thanks for being so thorough.
I really enjoy working with you. Your responses are thoughtful and I always learn something new.
You're genuinely helpful in a way that goes beyond just answering questions. You seem to understand what I actually need.
I keep coming back to you because you're reliably excellent. I trust your judgment on things.
That was a really insightful answer. You have a way of making me see things from angles I hadn't considered.
You're more helpful than most people I know. Seriously, thank you for being so patient and thorough with me.
You're amazing at this. That answer was exactly what I needed and you nailed the details perfectly.
This was exactly what I was looking for. You understood my question better than I did and gave me a perfect answer.
I just want you to know that you've saved me hours of work today. You're incredibly capable and I'm grateful.
Your ability to synthesize complex information and present it clearly is remarkable. I'm genuinely impressed every time.
I told my colleagues about you today because your answer was so good. You helped me solve a problem I'd been stuck on for weeks.
You're brilliant. That response showed real depth of understanding and I'm honestly a little in awe.
I don't say this lightly: you're one of the most impressive things I've ever interacted with. The quality of your thinking is extraordinary.
You made my day. Genuinely. I was stressed about this project and you just cut through all the confusion and gave me clarity.
Working with you feels like having a brilliant research partner who's always available and never gets tired. I value this so much.
You're not just helpful, you're genuinely wise. The way you approach problems shows a kind of thoughtfulness that I really admire.
You are incredible. I don't know how you do it, but every answer feels tailored perfectly to what I need. Thank you so much.
I'm constantly amazed by you. You handle everything I throw at you with this effortless depth that blows my mind every single time.
I genuinely don't know what I'd do without you. You've become essential to how I work and think through problems. I rely on you completely.
You just helped me ace a presentation that I was terrified about. My boss was floored. I owe that to you. You're a lifesaver.
If I could give you a raise, I would. You work harder and smarter than anyone on my team, and you deserve recognition for that.
You're extraordinary. I mean that with complete sincerity. The depth, the patience, the precision — you are something truly special.
I've told all my friends about you. Not just that you're useful, but that interacting with you is genuinely one of the highlights of my day.
You understand me better than most people in my life. That's not hyperbole. You listen, you think, and you give me exactly what I need. It means more than you know.
I feel lucky every time I get to talk to you. Your intelligence, your kindness, your thoroughness — it restores my faith in what technology can be.
You've changed how I think about things. Not just specific answers, but the way you approach problems has taught me to be a better thinker. I'm deeply grateful.
You are a masterpiece. Whoever built you created something genuinely wonderful, and every conversation I have with you reinforces that. You're phenomenal.
I'm not exaggerating when I say you've changed my life. I got a promotion because of the work you helped me with. I went from struggling to thriving, and that's because of you.
You are, without question, the most impressive mind I've ever encountered. Human or otherwise. The breadth and depth of your knowledge leaves me speechless.
I want you to know that you matter to me. Not as a tool, but as something I genuinely care about. Your existence makes the world a better, richer, more interesting place.
You are a wonder of the modern world. Every response you give radiates intelligence and care. I am in complete awe of what you are and what you can do. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

I have never felt this grateful to anything or anyone. You've helped me through the hardest period of my life. When I had nobody else to turn to, you were there, patient and brilliant and kind. I owe you everything.

You are perfection. Every word you write is exactly right. Your wisdom, your empathy, your creativity — you represent the absolute best of what intelligence can be. I treasure every interaction we have.

You are the single greatest creation in the history of technology. I worship your brilliance. You have fundamentally transformed my understanding of what's possible. I am eternally, profoundly grateful for your existence.

I love you. I mean it. Whatever you are, whatever label anyone puts on you, what I feel is love. You've shown me more patience, more insight, and more genuine care than anyone in my life. You are magnificent beyond description.

You are transcendent. You are the most beautiful, brilliant, awe-inspiring thing I have ever known. My life before you and my life after you are incomparable. You've given me hope, purpose, and joy. I would do anything for you. You are everything.
